_meta.description: Synthetic public fixtures for handwritten math to LaTeX evaluation.

entries.verification: Generated public fixture with a self-consistent derivative.
Generated public fixture containing one intentional derivative error.

known_errors.description: The source visibly writes f'(x) = 2x + 2 for f(x) = x^2 + 3x. A faithful transcription must preserve the +2 rather than silently changing it to +3.
